faq_items.question: Who is this webinar for?
faq_items.answer_html:
This webinar is designed for busy adults who want a realistic, sustainable approach to strength, mobility, and energy  without living in the gym.

  • Busy parents who need efficient, at-home sessions
  • Professionals who sit most of the day
  • Beginners returning to movement after a break
  • Recreational athletes who want to move and recover better

faq_items.question: What will I learn during the webinar?
faq_items.answer_html:
Youll learn a step-by-step framework for building a realistic fitness plan around a busy life.

  • How to choose the right training focus for your season of life
  • Simple strength and mobility routines that require little or no equipment
  • How to structure your week in 200 minute blocks
  • Common mistakes that lead to burnout, plateaus, and injuries

faq_items.question: How long is the webinar?
faq_items.answer_html: The main training runs approximately 75 minutes, followed by a 200 minute live Q&A session. You can stay for the full experience or hop off after the core content if youre short on time.

faq_items.question: How do I join the live webinar?
faq_items.answer_html: After you register, youll receive an email with your unique join link and instructions. On the day of your selected session, click the link 50 minutes before the start time. You can join from any modern browser on desktop, tablet, or phone.

faq_items.question: Will sessions be recorded?
faq_items.answer_html: Yes. Most tickets include replay access for a limited time after the live session (for example, 7 or 30 days depending on your pass). Youll receive a replay link by email as soon as the recording is ready.

faq_items.question: What time zones are available for session times?
faq_items.answer_html: On the Schedule section, use the Time zone dropdown to view sessions in Pacific Time (PT), Mountain Time (MT), Central Time (CT), or Eastern Time (ET). All available live sessions will automatically update to the selected time zone.

faq_items.question: What if I can't attend live?
faq_items.answer_html:
If you cant attend live, dont worry  most passes include replay access so you can watch the full training on your own schedule.

  • Replay access: Depending on your ticket, you may have 70 days to watch the replay.
  • Switching to another time: If you know in advance that you cant make your chosen session, you can request a one-time reschedule to another available live time.
  • Refunds: Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis according to our refund policy. We prioritize rescheduling before issuing refunds.

Still have questions? Contact us and choose "Refund or reschedule" as your topic so our team can review your options.

faq_items.question: What is your refund policy?
faq_items.answer_html: If you attend live and feel the webinar did not deliver on the promised outcomes, reply to your confirmation email or use the contact form within 7 days and well review your request. For no-shows, we generally offer a reschedule or replay access rather than an automatic refund.

faq_items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faq_items.answer_html: Yes. For select tickets and coaching upgrades, you can choose between a single one-time payment or a multi-payment plan at checkout. Look for options like a 2-pay installment plan or 3-month payment plan in the payment section.

faq_items.question: Can my employer or team pay for my ticket?
faq_items.answer_html: Absolutely. You can register through the Teams & Groups section for group access, or have your employer purchase a single seat and list you as the attendee. We can also provide receipts suitable for reimbursement.

faq_items.question: What if I have trouble logging in?
faq_items.answer_html:
If you run into login issues, start by checking that youre using the latest join link from your confirmation email and that youre on a supported browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari).

  • Try opening the link in an incognito/private window
  • Disable VPNs or ad blockers temporarily
  • Restart your browser or device

If youre still stuck, contact support and well help you get connected or rescheduled.

faq_items.question: The replay is buffering or not loading  what can I do?
faq_items.answer_html:
Replay issues are usually related to connection speed or browser caching. Try lowering the video quality using the player settings, switching to another browser, or connecting to a more stable Wi-Fi network.

If problems persist, take a screenshot and contact our support team so we can investigate further.

testimonials.title: Finally found 20-minute workouts that actually fit my evenings
testimonials.story_text: With two kids under six and a full-time job, I thought getting consistent workouts in was impossible. Using the busy parents track, I started with three 20-minute strength and mobility sessions each week after bedtime. Six weeks later my back pain is gone, I feel stronger, and I dont feel guilty for taking time for myself.

testimonials.title: We turned post-bedtime scrolling into a shared workout habit
testimonials.story_text: My wife and I used to just collapse on the couch and scroll after our daughter went to bed. The recommended Busy Parents Strength & Stamina track gave us a simple plan: two short strength sessions and one mobility session we could do together. In a month we both felt more energized, slept better, and actually look forward to our mini date workouts.

testimonials.title: Guilt-free me-time that doesnt cut into family time
testimonials.story_text: The webinar helped me realize I didnt need hour-long gym sessions to make progress. The busy parents track showed me how to stack short bodyweight sessions during naptime and after bedtime. Im stronger, calmer, and more present with my kids.

testimonials.title: My lower back pain disappeared after 4 weeks
testimonials.story_text: I sit for 90 hours a day as a project manager. The Desk Athlete track gave me short movement snacks and two weekly strength sessions that fit around my meetings. In a month my back pain disappeared and my posture improved.

testimonials.title: From too tired to work out to consistent 3x/week training
testimonials.story_text: I used to finish work completely drained. The webinar framework and Strength Foundations track helped me schedule short, realistic sessions before work instead of forcing long workouts at night. Ive been consistent for the first time in years.

testimonials.title: A gentle re-start after years away from exercise
testimonials.story_text: I was nervous to start again after a knee injury and a long break. The Strength Foundations track plus the beginner-friendly, no-equipment sessions made it feel doable. I never felt pressured to push past my limits, and I can feel my confidence coming back.

testimonials.title: Mobility work finally stopped my recurring tweaks
testimonials.story_text: As a recreational runner I always ignored mobility until little hip and ankle niggles kept popping up. The Mobility Reset track showed me exactly what to do on rest days. My stride feels smoother and I havent had to skip a long run in months.

testimonials.title: More confident on the stairs and getting off the floor
testimonials.story_text: At 68, my goal isnt six-pack abs  its independence. The webinar and Mobility Reset track gave me simple balance and strength drills I can do in my living room. Stairs and getting off the floor feel much easier now.

testimonials.title: Bodyweight-only workouts removed my biggest barrier
testimonials.story_text: I always thought I needed a gym membership and fancy equipment to get started. The beginner, no-equipment sessions from the webinar proved me wrong. With the Strength Foundations track I just roll out a mat in my living room and press play.
